entity.label: Helbah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Fatness, a town of the tribe of Asher (Judg. 1:31), in the plain of Phoenicia.

nodes.label: Helbah
nodes.description: Fatness, a town of the tribe of Asher (Judg. 1:31), in the plain of Phoenicia.

verses.text: Neither did Asher drive out the inhabitants of Accho, nor the inhabitants of Zidon, nor of Ahlab, nor of Achzib, nor of Helbah, nor of Aphik, nor of Rehob:
